subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-07-20
subcodes.first_line: There was a Motasarraf by the name of Abdu'r-Rahman Pasha. In some ways he became most inimical against us. He did his best to find a pretext
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
